verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm looking for a day, a bright & cloudless morning, When the pain of sin and death shall pass away; And if I look into the mirror, I may see a new reflection, And I'll know that it's the breaking of that great resurrection morning With a body glorified around me forming.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On that resurrection morning bright & fair, the saints shall come together and declare That all the ones Christ died to save will surely rise up from the grave, And together we'll meet Jesus in the air. On this resurrection morning no more strife, Just peace and joy forever -Eternal Life. And before that time we may be tossed and torn, But we'll be caught up from the raging storm-on that resurrection morn.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And if I leave this world before you, and I cross that crystal tide, and be numbered with the ones in Christ awaiting. Just remember on that day I'll take a body in perfection, And I'll stand before you, shining, and you'll know the resurrection is at hand. And like a thought we'll be translated to that promised land.
